title:
Help us improve data.govt.nz - 2018 community feedback survey
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Help us improve data.govt.nz - 2018 community feedback survey
We are currently running an online survey to gather data on how we can improve our customer experience for Data.govt.nz.
Your feedback is anonymous and will solely be used to improve our product and service.
The survey is open until the 24th September 2018 so if you would like to have your say we would really appreciate hearing from you.
We'll look to share the insights after we've finished and analysed the survey.
